mood: irritable before the gym, functional after

workout.notes: Emma was up at 3am with a nightmare. I was up until 4. Went anyway at 5. This is the thing. The going anyway is the thing.

work.focus: Budget variance review — Q2 is tracking 4% over on staffing costs
work.notes: Three hours on the variance analysis. Found the source — two contractors extended without going through my approval process. Corrective conversation with the team lead. She was apologetic and will not do it again. I was direct and not unkind. This is the version of me I prefer.
work.q1_status: on track — board deck outline started

jake_reading.notes: Tutor assessment today. She says he has phonological processing difficulty — not dyslexia, but adjacent. Treatable. She gave us a plan. I read the entire packet tonight.
jake_reading.reaction: Something released when she named it. The not-knowing was worse than the knowing.

kids.emma: Robotics camp deposit paid. She is extremely pleased with herself.

saturday_boundary.notes: A VP texted me Saturday morning about the staffing issue before I found it. I responded. I told myself it was necessary. I am not sure it was.

evening.tom: He asked how I was doing, specifically. Not 'how was your day' — how was I doing. I said I was fine and then I said actually I wasn't sure. He got up and made tea. We talked for 45 minutes. This is the conversation I've been rerouting around.
evening.notes: I told him about the Ecuador thing. Not the full version but the start of it. He didn't say anything immediately. Then he said: 'I didn't know you still thought about that.' I said: I didn't know I did either, not like this.

wins: Jake assessment complete — finally have a plan
at_risk: Saturday boundary — failed again; need to actually name this as a pattern to Tom
therapy_appointment: rescheduled — third time; moved to May 22
note: The Tom conversation. I have been waiting for a natural opening for three months. There isn't going to be a natural opening. I opened it artificially and it worked.
